subcodes.first_line: The essence of praise and glorification befitteth and beseemeth that Most Desired Lord, Who through the effulgences of the rays of the Sun of Truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: جوهر حمد و ثنا حضرت مقصودی را لایق و سزا که از اشراقات انوار آفتاب حقیقت
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @permission for visit; pilgrimage, @wisdom [hikmat]
